ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "language_support" TEXT /* Language support for the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the measurement unit (e.g., in, cm) */,
  "decimal_precision" INTEGER /* Decimal precision for measurements (e.g., 0.1, 0.01) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement for the size */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement for the size */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement for the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing item (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the item is intended for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the item is intended for (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item type (e.g., Casual, Formal, Sport) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the customer */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement of the customer */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., Customer measurement, AI suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory (e.g., Warehouse A, Store B) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Processing, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the clothing item */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales for the clothing item */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the item is intended for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the item is intended for (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region size chart */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement for the size in the region */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for the size in the region */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement for the size in the region */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement for the size in the region */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_size_charts_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit conversion */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement unit */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the unit */,
  "target_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target measurement unit */,
  "target_conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate to the target unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_conversions_target_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_conversions_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)
